info.name: Clients API — Testes Rigorosos
info.description:
Suite completa com 53 requests cobrindo: CRUD Lifecycle (E2E), validações de schema (422), conflitos de unicidade (409), erros de formato (400), boundary values e contrato de resposta.

Pré-requisito: API rodando em http://localhost:8000

Como executar com Newman:
  npx newman run clients-api-rigorous-tests.postman_collection.json --delay-request 200

item.name: 🔄 01 | CRUD Lifecycle (E2E) — Create → Read → PUT → PATCH → Delete → Confirm 404

exec: pm.test('Schema: id is valid 24-char ObjectId hex', () => pm.expect(b.id).to.match(/^[a-f0-9]{24}$/i));
pm.test('Schema: created_at is valid ISO 8601', () => pm.expect(new Date(b.created_at).toString()).to.not.equal('Invalid Date'));
pm.test('Schema: updated_at is valid ISO 8601', () => pm.expect(new Date(b.updated_at).toString()).to.not.equal('Invalid Date'));
pm.test('Business: name matches payload', () => pm.expect(b.name).to.eql('Lifecycle Client'));
pm.test('Business: created_at PRESERVED by PUT (not overwritten)', () => pm.expect(b.created_at).to.eql(pm.collectionVariables.get('lifecycleCreatedAt')));
pm.test('Business: updated_at is valid ISO date', () => pm.expect(new Date(b.updated_at).toString()).to.not.equal('Invalid Date'));
pm.test('Business: name updated by PATCH', () => pm.expect(b.name).to.eql('Lifecycle Patched'));
pm.test('Business: email NOT changed by name-only PATCH', () => pm.expect(b.email).to.eql(`lifecycle.updated.${runId}@test.com`));
pm.test('Business: document NOT changed by name-only PATCH', () => pm.expect(b.document).to.eql('98.765.432/0001-10'));
pm.test('Business: created_at NOT changed by PATCH', () => pm.expect(b.created_at).to.eql(pm.collectionVariables.get('lifecycleCreatedAt')));
pm.test('Error format: has detail field', () => pm.expect(b).to.have.property('detail'));
// Generate unique CNPJ using runId (split into two 3-digit groups)
pm.test('Schema: id is valid 24-char ObjectId hex', () => pm.expect(b.id).to.match(/^[a-f0-9]{24}$/i));
pm.test('Schema: both timestamps are valid ISO 8601', () => {
pm.test('Business: document stored in CPF format', () => pm.expect(b.document).to.eql(pm.collectionVariables.get('cpfDocument')));
// Generate unique CNPJ using runId (split into two 3-digit groups)

pm.test('Business: document stored in CNPJ format', () => pm.expect(b.document).to.eql(pm.collectionVariables.get('generatedCNPJ')));
pm.test('Business: name matches payload', () => pm.expect(b.name).to.eql('CNPJ Company Ltda'));
